overview: BioMD Balance Solutions is an integrative medicine clinic offering bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, anti-aging treatments, and medical weight management for men and women. Dr. Olga Beregovskaya combines conventional medicine with innovative techniques to address hormonal imbalances and age-related wellness concerns through medically-supervised, personalized treatment plans.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy with multiple delivery methods
targetAudience: Men and women seeking hormone replacement therapy, anti-aging treatments, and medical weight management through an integrative medicine approach.
